_note: Labelled retrieval eval set. Some questions paraphrase the answer with little lexical overlap on purpose, so the offline hashing (bag-of-tokens) embedder visibly MISSES them — that gap is the motivation for real embeddings (set EMBEDDING_PROVIDER) and better chunking.

documents.text: Refunds are processed within 5 business days after approval. To request a refund, open a ticket from your account page and include the order number.
Standard shipping takes 3 to 7 days. Express shipping is delivered the next business day. International shipping may take up to 14 days.
Our support team is available Monday to Friday, 9am to 6pm JST. We are closed on Japanese public holidays.
You can reset your password from the login page using the forgot password link. Two-factor authentication can be enabled in account settings.
We accept credit cards, PayPal, and bank transfer. Invoices are issued automatically after each successful payment.

examples.question: How do I request a refund?
How do I reset my password?
What payment methods do you accept?
What is your money-back turnaround time?
Can I enable two-step login security?
